title: 252Koko
description: A mod that adds 252koko to the game!
body:
# This awesome mod brings a new furry friend, **252Koko**, into the game! :D

![Holding Steak To Seven 252Kokos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3375b2d0c9db27fac28bf46a359c662b73728e96.png)

## **Information**

Koko Spawns in the following snow biomes: Snowy Slopes, Snowy Plains, Snowy Beach, Snowy Taiga, Grove

Koko will only begin to attack if you inflict damage on it.

Koko will follow you if you are holding cooked beef. (Steak)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

_This mod was made using MCreator [MCreator's Website](https://mcreator.net/)_

</details>
